name: Indexed Experience Memory
summary: Replace trajectory in context with an index pointer + external KV store, RL-trained recall.
rejected_reason: Variant of memgpt-paging: pointer-in-window + external store + addressable rehydration via search/read is exactly the RAM/disk paging mechanism; the only delta (RL-trained recall policy) is already covered by agentic-memory. Folded into memgpt-paging aliases (Indexed Experience Memory, Memex(RL), Indexed Experience Store).
